creator: luigi@iet.unipi.it
text:
When using the Partition option, the system reports random
	geometries (different each time). The total number of sectors
	is close to the real one.

Fix: 

I think this has to do with the absence/lack of documentation
	on a standard way to get geometry info from the disk drive.
	For what I know some of the related ioctl try to read geomery
	info from the disk instead of going straight to the IDE
	device.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run "Partition" from the boot floppy.
